do: Kill the Blackguards holding Clarissa on the road (starts Lost in Love)
Tag the waypoint
Head north-west into The Sarn Encampment
steps.layout: One road — water on the left, ruins on the right. Town is north-west of the WP.

do: Stash/vendor if needed
Exit to The Slums
Cross to the far square and enter The Crematorium
Ignore the sewer grate for now — you'll come back with the keys
steps.layout: Stairs onto the roofs/rafters lead to the Crematorium square. The sewer grate spawns at ground level, nearer the town side.

do: Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (furnace traps) — 4 of 6 for Normal Lab
Push to Piety's show — she flees; grab TOLMAN'S BRACELET from Tolman
LOGOUT to town
Turn in Lost in Love → Clarissa gives the SEWER KEYS; grab the gem reward from Maramoa
Exit to The Slums, open the sewer grate (marked), drop into The Sewers
Grab the 3 platinum busts from the quest-marked stashes (Victario's Secrets)
Tag the waypoint — you'll WP back here later for the Undying Blockage
Exit to The Marketplace
steps.layout: Busts sit in side rooms: one near your entrance, one by the WP, one at the far end away from the Marketplace exit.

do: Tag the waypoint
Find The Catacombs entrance and go down
steps.layout: Two halves joined by a statue-lined road; the Catacombs door sits near the area boundary.

do: DO the Trial of Ascendancy (blade sentries) — 5 of 6
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Heavy COLD damage zone — a Sapphire Flask helps.

do: Turn in Victario's Secrets → +1 PASSIVE (Hargan)
Waypoint → The Marketplace, exit to The Battlefront
Tag the waypoint (centre, ringed by barricades)
Open the Blackguard chest for the RIBBON SPOOL — Captain Aurelianus guards it; kite him, no need to kill
Take the Docks exit
steps.layout: Exits: Docks on one side, Solaris Temple at the top. The Spool chest is toward the bottom, before the sealed Ebony Barracks barrier.

do: Rush the THAUMETIC SULPHITE chest (quest-marked, end of a branch)
LOGOUT to town, waypoint → The Battlefront, head up to the Solaris exit
steps.tip: Zone runs 2 levels above the curve — grab the Sulphite and get out.

do: Push through the maze of rooms to the stairs up
Reach Dialla at the end of the maze: talk (The Gemling Queen), turn in the Ribbon Spool, hand over the Sulphite → INFERNAL TALC
Tag the waypoint next to her, then waypoint → The Sewers
From the WP, run to the Undying Blockage (quest-marked) and burn it with the Infernal Talc
Enter The Ebony Barracks
Climb the tiers — tag the waypoint by the Imperial Gardens door on the right wall
Kill General Gravicius at his camp up the big stairs — heavy FIRE damage
Continue behind the camp to The Lunaris Temple Level 1
Push through the halls — the waypoint sits at the stairs down to Level 2
Climb — three staircases up, never take stairs down
Kill Piety — she swaps between LIGHTNING and ICE forms; keep moving
Pick up the TOWER KEY she drops
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Topaz + Sapphire flasks cover both of her forms.

do: Turn in: Piety's Pets → +1 PASSIVE (Grigor), Sever the Right Hand → gem reward (Maramoa)
Buy/socket gem upgrades
Waypoint → The Ebony Barracks — the Imperial Gardens door is right beside the WP
Tag the waypoint at the road fork
DO the Trial of Ascendancy (dart traps) — 6 of 6: NORMAL LAB is now open (Aspirants' Plaza, in town)
IF your build needs gems: left fork → The Library — bring Siosa the 4 Golden Pages from The Archives and he sells nearly every gem
Take the right fork and open The Sceptre of God with the Tower Key
steps.layout: Trial is usually in the top-left corner. Rubble piles on the roads can be jumped with movement skills.
steps.tip: Most builds run Normal Lab right after Dominus — Ascendancy is the biggest power spike of the campaign.

do: Climb the three circular floors — waypoint is in a random room on the third
Continue up to The Upper Sceptre of God
Climb to the top and kill Dominus — phase 1: dodge the Touch of God slam (huge LIGHTNING); phase 2 demon form: don't stand in the blood rain, it stacks damage over time
Take the passage beyond the arena → Act 4 (The Aqueduct)
steps.tip: Target: level 32–33 leaving Act 3. Run Normal Lab now if you haven't.
